Name: Nicole will take care of it
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Ellen's Mindscape Cinema [The Feast Begins]
Desc2:
A card with a personal photo of Ellen printed on it.
"Ugh, this is so embarrassing... You're always catching me in the act!"
"But as your friend, I can't help but feel a little concerned about your hobbies... Can you really do this? You're not just gonna get a talking-to from your parents?"
